requirement: Run from ~/deu_class/CLASS-DEU after activating ~/deu_class/deu_boltzmann_start/.venv and setting COBAYA_PACKAGES_PATH.
Use the local CLASS-DEU build; do not substitute a pip-installed classy build.
Verify two DEU chain files and two native/baseline chain files are present before evidence replication.
Reproduce Stage 3B-10 parameter summaries from the two DEU production chains.
Reproduce Stage 3B-19 native parameter summaries from the two native/baseline chains.
Reproduce the Stage 3B-26/27 formal cross-check lineage before reading independent-validation results.
Reproduce Stage 3B-31/32 independent-validation evidence lineage and sensitivity/consistency rows.
Confirm TT_lite remains diagnostic-only and is not claimed as sampled posterior/evidence likelihood.
Retain the high-l, lowl+TTTEEE, and full-objective working-lock tri-anchor context.
Do not permit model-superiority, external-publication, or final-style claims until an external reviewer/replication gate is booked.
